features.name: memory with enable-gated registered address read
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array memory with a registered address where the enable signal gates the address latch update inside a clocked always block

features.name: memory with unconditional address latch and output mux gating
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array memory where the address register updates unconditionally but the read enable gates the output through a multiplexer
